full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Design ablation study removing part and deformation features
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Design an ablation study for DPM with these variants: (1) root-only, (2) root+parts (no deformation), (3) root+deformation (no part appearance), (4) full DPM. Explain what each ablation tests scientifically.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Reduced to three ablation variants (root-only, no-deformation, full DPM) for clarity. Added per-variant confusion matrices and a grouped bar chart comparing accuracy/F1.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Create a grouped bar chart showing accuracy and F1 for each ablation variant, and side-by-side confusion matrices. Save to results/.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Changed to seaborn-styled plots, added error metric annotations, saved CSV summary alongside PNGs.

top_5_prompts: What ablation experiments make sense for the DPM scoring function?
How do I selectively zero-out feature groups in a trained SVM to simulate ablation?
Why is the deformation penalty important for DPM according to the paper?
Create grouped bar charts comparing ablation variants on accuracy and F1.
Generate confusion matrices for each ablation variant side by side.

student_declaration.statement: I confirm this file accurately reports LLM usage for this task.
